LanguageData.PE_ClassroomsDescription: Classrooms will appear here as you build them in your colony.
LanguageData.PE_CreateClassDesc: Create a new class semester. Classes train students in various skills. Daycares are for children only and teach one random skill each session based on the teacher's proficiency and what students can learn. All classes satisfy children's learning need.
LanguageData.PE_ConfirmDeleteClass: Are you sure you would like to delete this class?
LanguageData.PE_Daycare: Fulfills children's learning need. Scheduled until it's deleted.
LanguageData.PE_NewClassroomCreatedDesc: You have created a classroom. Classes can be managed in the classrooms menu on the bottom bar.
LanguageData.PE_TeacherRoleRequiresSocialSkill: Teachers must have social skills enabled.
LanguageData.PE_ClassCancelledDesc: The class "{0}" has been cancelled because not all students could make it to class in time.
LanguageData.PE_ClassCompletedDesc: The class "{0}" has successfully completed its semester.
LanguageData.PE_StudentNotQualifiedProficiency: {0} does not have the required {1} proficiency.
LanguageData.PE_StudentAlreadyHasProficiency: {0} already has the required or higher {1} proficiency.
LanguageData.PE_CannotParticipateScheduled: Cannot participate: Scheduled at {0}h - {1}h for the "{2}" class.
LanguageData.PE_CannotRescheduleScheduled: Cannot reschedule: {0} is already scheduled at {1}h - {2}h for the "{3}" class.
LanguageData.PE_TeacherNotQualifiedProficiency: {0} does not have the required {1} proficiency to teach.
LanguageData.PE_TeacherNotQualifiedSkill: {0}'s {1} skill is too low to teach (must be at least 5).
LanguageData.PE_StudentSkillDisabled: {0}'s {1} skill is disabled and cannot be trained.
LanguageData.PE_NoLearningBoard: No learning board found in classroom
LanguageData.PE_RestrictReservationsDuringClass_Desc: If enabled, pawns will not be able to use classroom furniture (desks, etc.).
LanguageData.PE_InterruptJobsDuringClass: Interrupt all jobs to attend classes here
LanguageData.PE_InterruptJobsDuringClass_Desc: If enabled, pawns will interrupt all of their current jobs to attend class in this classroom when the bell rings.
LanguageData.PE_ClassCancelledOffMap: {0} class cancelled today as members are off map.
LanguageData.PE_NoClassesScheduled: No classes scheduled. Click the plus button to create a class.
LanguageData.PE_TriedToEquipButCouldNotDueToLackOfPro: {0} tried to equip {1} but couldn't due to lack of proficiency
LanguageData.PE_ClassPartiallyFunctioningWarning: Class {0} will function at reduced efficiency because not all participants are present.
LanguageData.PE_ProficiencyClassNeverStarted: Class {0} never started as not all students arrived in time.
LanguageData.PE_AlreadyHasLearningBoard: This room already has a learning board.
LanguageData.PE_LearningBoardNearby: There is another learning board too close nearby.
LanguageData.PE_NoTeacherForBell: No valid teacher found for classroom. Cannot ring bell.
LanguageData.PE_ScenPart_ForcedProficiencyTrait_NoTra: All starting colonists will have a proficiency trait.
LanguageData.PE_RemovedFromDaycareOnAgeUp: {0} has aged up and has been removed from the "{1}" daycare.
LanguageData.PE_TeacherBellFailure: Class never started as teacher couldn't alert enough students within the scheduled time. Consider upgrading your school bell or lengthening the class session.
LanguageData.PE_NoBellToCreateClass: You must build a class bell or chime before you can create a class.
LanguageData.PE_TeacherOffMap: Class {0} was cancelled because the teacher is not on its map.
LanguageData.PE_NoStudents: Class {0} was cancelled as there were no students.
LanguageData.PE_AddedToDaycareOnAgeUp: {0} has aged up and has been automatically added to the "{1}" daycare.
LanguageData.PE_StudyGroupFull: Study group already has {0} students and cannot accept more.
LanguageData.PE_TeacherSkillDisabled: {0}'s {1} skill is disabled and thus cannot teach.
LanguageData.PE_CannotSchedule: Cannot schedule: {0} is already scheduled at {1}h - {2}h in the {3} classroom.
LanguageData.PE_EditClassDesc: Update the roster of an ongoing class, rename it, or change the hours. Students can be freely removed, but if the class has made any progress, they cannot be added to it.
LanguageData.PE_CannotAddOngoing: Cannot add to an ongoing class they are not part of.
LanguageData.PE_CantChangeTeacher: Class is ongoing so the teacher role is locked
LanguageData.PE_AddKids_Desc: If enabled, daycares in this classroom are allowed to add children when they age-up.
LanguageData.PE_CannotAttendClass: Class {0} was suspended because the teacher is not available.
LanguageData.PE_CannotUnsuspendNoTeacher: Cannot unsuspend class: Teacher unavailable to teach
LanguageData.PE_BestowProficiencyDesc: Select a colonist to receive the researched proficiency. They must be capable of Intellectual work.
LanguageData.PE_StudentMustBeOneTierBelow: Student must be exactly one tier below {0}.
LanguageData.PE_TeacherMustHaveProficiency: Teacher must have at least {0} proficiency.
LanguageData.PE_EnableKnowledgePanel: Enable knowledge panel? (Disable to show as standard traits)
LanguageData.PE_BestowProficiencyToAll: Bestow proficiency onto all current population once researched?
LanguageData.PE_GiddyUpNeedRiding: Colonist must be taught animal riding proficiency.
